description_long: This is a black steampunk-style top hat adorned with an array of metallic gears, chains, and decorative elements in gold and silver tones. The front features a pair of round goggles, one with a lightning bolt motif, and a large gold medallion, all attached to the hatband. The crown is flat-topped and decorated with a central gold spike and several smaller metallic studs. The brim is wide and flat, providing a classic silhouette, while the sides and back are embellished with additional gears and chains, enhancing the industrial aesthetic. The materials appear to be a combination of felt or fabric for the main body, with plastic or metal for the decorative elements. This hat is both eye-catching and thematic, suitable for cosplay or urban fashion statements.
description: A black steampunk top hat with gold and silver gears, chains, and goggles, featuring a flat crown and wide brim. The front is decorated with a gold medallion, goggles, and a lightning bolt motif.
description_view_0: Front view shows the goggles, gold medallion, lightning bolt, and central spike on the crown.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hanging gold chain and several metallic gears attached to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the hat with minimal decoration and the central spike visible on the crown.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals more gears and a partial view of the chain, with the crown's spike and studs visible.
